Package com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories

Class MovieRepository

java.lang.Object
com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.MovieRepository
public class MovieRepository extends Object
Static in-memory repository that holds all Movie screening records. The in-memory map is loaded once at startup via loadMovies() and kept in sync with the movies table for every write operation.

Occupied seats per movie are derived from the booking_seats and bookings tables — replacing the denormalised SEAT column that was previously written back to MOVIES.csv on save/logout.

  • Constructor Details

    • MovieRepository

      public MovieRepository()

  • Method Details

    • loadMovies

      public static void loadMovies() throws SQLException
      Loads all rows from the movies table into the in-memory map, including the current occupied seats per movie derived from bookings and booking_seats. Must be called once at application startup, replacing the previous MovieCsvIO.getIO().readCsvFile() call in KetchupMain.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the database cannot be queried

    • getMovies

      public static LinkedHashMap<String,Movie> getMovies()
      Returns the entire in-memory movie map.
      Returns:
      a LinkedHashMap mapping movie ID → Movie

    • addMovie

      public static Movie addMovie(String title, String genre, int duration, String rating, String showTime, String occupiedSeat, int seatPrice) throws SQLException
      Creates a new Movie, inserts it into the movies table, and adds it to the in-memory map. The movie ID is generated as a UUID.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the movie
      genre - the genre of the movie
      duration - the runtime in minutes
      rating - the age rating (e.g. "PG-13")
      showTime - the showtime string in yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm format
      occupiedSeat - comma-separated already-booked seat IDs, or ""
      seatPrice - the price per seat in USD
      Returns:
      the newly created Movie instance
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the INSERT fails

    • editMovie

      public static void editMovie(String id, Movie edited) throws SQLException
      Replaces the movie record in both the movies table and the in-memory map with the supplied edited Movie. Occupied seats (stored in booking_seats) are not affected by this operation.
      Parameters:
      id - the movie ID of the record to update
      edited - the updated Movie object to store
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the UPDATE fails

    • deleteMovie

      public static void deleteMovie(String id) throws SQLException
      Removes the movie with the given ID from both the movies table and the in-memory map. Because bookings has a foreign key referencing movies, any associated booking records (and their booking_seats rows) must be deleted first — or the schema must define ON DELETE CASCADE on those foreign keys.
      Parameters:
      id - the movie ID of the record to delete
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the DELETE fails

    • searchMovie

      public static ArrayList<Movie> searchMovie(String information)
      Searches the in-memory movie store for records matching the given query. If the query exactly matches a movie ID, that single movie is returned. Otherwise, all movies whose title, genre, duration, rating, showtime, or seat price contain the query are returned.
      Parameters:
      information - the search query string
      Returns:
      an ArrayList of matching Movie objects; empty if no matches are found
